name: Kuzuhamon: Miko Mode

signature_move.name: Ura Izuna
signature_move.description: Attacks the opponent with the kuda-gitsune carried on its waist.

description: A form Kuzuhamon takes when it performs Shinto rituals and listens to God 's will. It seldom fights in Miko Mode , but has strengthened its ability to exorcise evil spirits.
